text.title: API GraphQL Design Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a API GraphQL Design artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo dev backs an iOS app with GraphQL: SDL-first, DataLoader on user→posts→comments, Relay cursor pagination on posts, persisted queries with hash IDs in iOS client.

list.item: Source-of-truth refs: ≥1 verifiable URL + ≥1 dashboard or transcript reference.
Triggering activity matches AGENTS.md 'Applies If' list (ALL items hold).
Step 1 — `prerequisites_ok=true`; all refs reachable and citable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.

section.title: Final artefact (valid)
section.code: { "artefact_id": "api-graphql-2026-05-23", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "last_touched": "2026-05-23T12:00:00Z", "template_version": "1.1.0", "status": "ready_for_review", "evidence": [ { "source": "https://example.com/source-1", "citation": "verbatim quote from source" } ], "api_id": "draft", "schema_path": "draft", "dataloader_required": true, "pagination_style": "draft", "depth_limit": 1, "complexity_limit": 1, "persisted_queries": true, "introspection_in_prod": true }
